Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
do 'TipoTrnMode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DobtnFechar'
WWPActions.WCPopup_Close('layout')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.sdtLayNom.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Nome'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_sdtLayNom.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.PrimeiraLinha.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Primeira Linha'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_PrimeiraLinha.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.DataDaVenda.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data Da Venda'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_DataDaVenda.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.Bandeira.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Bandeira'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_Bandeira.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.FormaDePagamento.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Forma De Pagamento'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_FormaDePagamento.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.ValorDaVenda.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Valor Da Venda'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_ValorDaVenda.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.ValorLiquido.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Valor Líquido'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_ValorLiquido.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.DataDoPagamento.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data Do Pagamento'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_DataDoPagamento.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.NSU.IsEmpty() = true) AND &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.CodigoDeAutorizacao.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Codigo De Autorizacao'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_CodigoDeAutorizacao.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.CodigoDeAutorizacao.IsEmpty() = true) AND &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.NSU.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','NSU'), DVMessageType.error, sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NSU.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.NSU.IsEmpty() = true sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_CodigoDeAutorizacao_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_CodigoDeAutorizacao_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.Campo.CodigoDeAutorizacao.IsEmpty() = true sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NSU_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NSU_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Enter
do 'CheckRequiredFields'
if &CheckRequiredFieldsResult msg(&sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.ToJson()) do case case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Insert CrudLayout(TrnMode.Insert, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha)
case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Update CrudLayout(TrnMode.Update, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha) endcase
WWPActions.WCPopup_Close('layout') endif
EndEvent
Sub 'TipoTrnMode'
do case case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Update &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.FromJson(&WebSession.Get('#CONMAQ_LAYOUTCSV')) &WebSession.Remove('#CONMAQ_LAYOUTCSV') case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Display &sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha.FromJson(&WebSession.Get('#CONMAQ_LAYOUTCSV')) tabelaAcoes.Visible = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_sdtLayNom.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_PrimeiraLinha.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_DataDaVenda.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_Bandeira.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_FormaDePagamento.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_ValorDaVenda.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_ValorLiquido.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_DataDoPagamento.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_CodigoDeAutorizacao.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NSU.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NumeroDoCartao.enabled = false sdtLayoutConciliaMaquininha_Campo_NomeDoCartao.enabled = false &WebSession.Remove('#CONMAQ_LAYOUTCSV') endcase
EndSub
